---
name: Feedback
about: Use this template to submit feedback, bug reports, or feature requests. Do not include personal or sensitive information.
labels: feedback, triage
---

## Summary

Provide a short, one-line summary of your feedback.

## Category

- Bug
- Feature request
- Usability
- Documentation
- Other

## Page / URL (optional)

Provide the app page or URL where you saw this.

## Details

Describe the issue or suggestion. Include steps to reproduce, expected vs actual behaviour, screenshots, and any other useful details.

## Contact

If you'd like a response, provide an email address (optional).
